pr.title: docs: add coding-agent competition research
pr.body:
## Summary

- add competition dossiers for Devin, Cursor Background Agents, Replit Agent, and GitHub Copilot Cloud Agent
- update the competition index and cross-market takeaways for coding-agent delegation loops
- document design, feature flows, marketing, and public friction signals in the existing parseable competition contract

## Validation

- structural check for all 42 competition product folders
- ASCII check for new/changed competition docs
- `scripts\codex-git.ps1 diff --check -- competition`
- `npm.cmd run check:generated-files`
pr.author: Tyler-R-Kendrick
